\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4469 introduces Entry Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{V}_D = \iiint_{\Omega} \left( \sqrt{-g} - \Phi_{\text{obj}} \right) d^3x \implies F_g = \rho_{\text{vac}} \cdot \mathcal{V}_D \cdot \int_{\mathcal{M}} \delta g_{\mu\nu} \, dV$$
